g.text: 分布式限流系统架构 / RateLimiterDemo Architecture
.NET 10 + Aspire 13.2 + Redis — Multi-instance Global Rate Limiting
1. Client sends HTTP request / 客户端发送请求
2. Load balancer routes to one of 3 API instances / 负载均衡分发
3. RateLimitingMiddleware checks rate limit / 中间件检查限流
4. Redis returns shared counter (atomic operation) / Redis 返回共享计数
5. Allowed → process request; Denied → HTTP 429 / 放行或拒绝
6. Response headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining / 响应头
多实例共享 Redis 计数器，确保限流策略全局一致（原子操作保证精确性）
